creator: vmagerya@gmail.com
text:
Update games/wormux from 0.8 to 0.8.1.
New version includes updated graphics, new maps, bugfixes and more.

As a side-note, the mail host of the maintainer seems down for some time now, so I'm not sure how to reach him for approval.

Also games/wormux-devel should probably be updated too.
(I would have CC'd the maintainer of games/wormux-devel miwi@freebsd.org, but web interface does not have this feature).

Fix: Patch included.

Patch attached with submission follows:
